title: hedge-suggester output
description: Canonical structured output for the hedge-suggester skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered structures table + take line) is described in references/rendering.md. Costs are in dollars: debit positive, credit negative.

as_of.description: Local as-of date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

ticker.description: Underlying ticker of the long position.

spot_source.description: Which price-fallback step won (lastTrade, min.c, day.c, prevDay.c, no_price).

error.description: Present only when the run could not price hedges (e.g. no spot).

contracts_per_leg.description: Option contracts per hedge leg (shares / 100, floor).

expiry.description: Chosen expiry: nearest listed expiry at or beyond the horizon.

structures.description: Priced hedge structures. Each carries cost, payoff bounds, protection region, and greeks at open.

legs.description: Option legs. Stock is the implicit long underlying, not a leg.

mid.description: Chain mid used to price the leg.

net_cost_usd.description: Net premium: debit positive, credit negative.

breakeven.description: Conventional breakeven price of the combined position.

protection_ceiling.description: Upper edge of the insured downside region (price at which downside protection begins).

protection_floor.description: Lower edge of the insured downside region (0 for a full put floor).

upside_cap.description: Strike above which upside is capped (covered call, collar). Null if upside is uncapped.

downside_protected_usd.description: (protection_ceiling - protection_floor) * shares: the insured downside region in dollars.

cost_per_dollar_protected.description: net_cost_usd / downside_protected_usd. Lower (or negative) is cheaper insurance.

max_loss_usd.description: Worst combined-position P&L over a 0..3x spot grid at expiry.

max_gain_usd.description: Best combined-position P&L at expiry, or null when upside is uncapped.

net_delta.description: Share-equivalent delta of stock + option legs at open.

net_theta.description: Position theta per day (dollars) at open.

tradeoff.description: One-line plain-language tradeoff of this structure.

caveats.description: Per-structure caveats: liquidity flags (thin OI, wide spread) and tail risk.

ranking.description: Structures ranked by cost per dollar of downside protected, cheapest first.

skipped_structures.description: Structures that could not be priced and why.

iv_context.description: Is protection expensive right now, proxied by ATM implied vol versus trailing realized vol.

take.description: Recommendation of the structure that best fits the stated risk tolerance, with cost and protection. Ends with a not-advice disclaimer.

tier_caveats.description: Run-wide caveats: rate limits, delayed tape, mid-price optimism, earnings not fetched, assignment/early-exercise, IV context.
